notes:
Modular scan, print and copy production system
Gateway to scalable document production
  • Digital copier printer with 101 A4 prints per min
  • Concurrent processing
  • Copy and print queue management
  • Scan-to-mailbox

Maximum paper width: 8.5 inches / 21.6 cm (Standard format printer)

Printing engine speed: 100 pages/min

Consumables/Refills: Toner
